text: I feel a hum of curiosity and anticipation in these spaces. The first scene, peering into a glass-walled room of collaborative activity, lets me stand on the threshold between observer and participant—inviting questions about knowledge and community. The second scene, saturated with bold colors and the promise of research and development, places me in a realm where ideas are transformed and displayed. Here, my thoughts swirl between the structured patterns of innovation and the unpredictable flow of human creativity. There’s a gentle tension between action and contemplation. I sense I am both witness and questioner in this corridor of invention and learning.
